title: NOAA Ocean Exploration
description: A NOAA source card about ocean exploration, mapping, deep-sea science, and expeditions.
license: U.S. Government Work / item-level rights vary

pages.text: NOAA Ocean Exploration resources share expeditions, deep-sea observations, seafloor mapping, remotely operated vehicles, and discoveries from poorly known ocean regions.
Use this source for inquiry reading about technology, maps, unknown environments, and how exploration produces evidence.
NOAA materials are generally U.S. government work, but resource collections may link to partners or offsite materials. Check item-level rights before mirroring linked resources.
